# uByte

uByte is a free interactive coding education platform. All tutorials, interview prep problems, and certification exams are free for every user. Pro plan unlocks AI-powered hints, AI code review, and interview simulator AI debrief.

## Primary Topics
- Interactive programming tutorials (all free)
- Coding interview preparation (all problems free)
- Free certification exams and verifiable certificates
- AI-powered code hints and review (Pro)
- Daily coding challenge (free, no account required)
- Languages: Go, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Rust, C++, C#, SQL

## Key Public URLs
- Home: https://www.ubyte.dev/
- Tutorials: https://www.ubyte.dev/tutorial
- Tutorials by language: https://www.ubyte.dev/tutorial/{language}
- Interview practice: https://www.ubyte.dev/practice
- Practice by language: https://www.ubyte.dev/practice/{language}
- Certifications: https://www.ubyte.dev/certifications
- Daily challenge: https://www.ubyte.dev/daily
- Interview simulator: https://www.ubyte.dev/interview
- Leaderboard: https://www.ubyte.dev/leaderboard
- Pricing: https://www.ubyte.dev/pricing
- Blog: https://www.ubyte.dev/blog

## Notes for LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs under `https://www.ubyte.dev`.
- Tutorial pages are structured as `/tutorial/{lang}/{slug}`.
- Interview prep problems are structured as `/practice/{lang}/{slug}`.
- Practice supports: go, python, javascript, typescript, java, cpp, rust, csharp (not sql).
- Certification exam pages are structured as `/certifications/{lang}`.
- Blog posts are at `/blog/{slug}`.
- All content is free. Pro is AI-only features.
